title: Circuit takes long time to read (and synth)

features.name: deep generate loop with internal cell instantiation
features.description: Code should include a generate for-loop that instantiates internal Yosys cell primitives (e.g. $_DFFE_PP_) in a long chain of depth 100 or more, exercising read_verilog -icells and opt_clean scalability

features.name: parameterized shift register with dynamic bit select
features.description: Code should include a parameterized register array used as a shift register where the output is selected dynamically via a variable index into the shift register state, creating variable-length shift register behavior

features.name: generate loop with initial blocks on register array elements
features.description: Code should include a generate for-loop that applies initial blocks to individual elements of a multi-dimensional register array, producing many initial processes that stress synthesis tools

features.name: nested generate for-loops with parameterized large depth
features.description: Code should include nested generate for-loops iterating over parameterized dimensions where depth values exceed 100, causing quadratic explosion in generated instances that stress opt_clean and synthesis passes
